metadata.description: Comprehensive guide for contributors to the Valkey server codebase - architecture, internals, build system, testing, governance, and contribution workflow

sources.title: Valkey GitHub Repository
sources.relevance: Primary source code repository with README, build instructions, and project structure

sources.title: Valkey CONTRIBUTING.md
sources.relevance: Official contribution guide covering DCO, PR process, testing requirements, and development workflow

sources.title: Valkey GOVERNANCE.md
sources.relevance: TSC structure, decision-making process, voting rules, maintainer management, and major decision criteria

sources.title: Valkey MAINTAINERS.md
sources.relevance: Current maintainers list with company affiliations, committers, and leadership structure

sources.title: Valkey DeepWiki - Architecture Overview
sources.relevance: Comprehensive codebase analysis covering event loop, networking, data structures, persistence, replication, cluster, threading

sources.title: Valkey DeepWiki - Build and Setup
sources.relevance: Build system details including Makefile targets, dependencies, and build process overview

sources.title: Valkey DeepWiki - Testing and QA
sources.relevance: Test framework architecture, test organization, CI/CD integration, key testing components

sources.title: Valkey Tests README
sources.relevance: Official test suite documentation - running tests, debugging, tagging system, TLS setup, external server mode

sources.title: Valkey Development Guide Issue #1558
sources.relevance: Coding style, naming conventions, configuration philosophy, best practices for Valkey developers

sources.title: Valkey Releases and Versioning Schema
sources.relevance: Complete versioning scheme, release cadence, RC process, support timelines, API compatibility contracts

sources.title: Valkey 8.0 Release Announcement
sources.relevance: I/O threading rewrite, dual-channel replication, per-slot metrics, RDMA support, key embedding

sources.title: Valkey 8.1 GA Release
sources.relevance: New hashtable, SIMD optimizations, active defrag improvements, TLS threading, COMMANDLOG, SET IFEQ

sources.title: Valkey 9.0 Introduction
sources.relevance: Atomic slot migration, multi-database clustering, hash field expiration, MPTCP, AVX-512, TLS cert auth

sources.title: Unlock 1 Million RPS - Valkey I/O Threading
sources.relevance: Deep dive into I/O threading architecture, thread roles, synchronization, dynamic management, performance metrics

sources.title: Unlock 1 Million RPS Part 2 - Memory Access Amortization
sources.relevance: Key prefetch optimization, batch command processing, memory_prefetch.c implementation, 50% throughput improvement

sources.title: Performance Optimization Methodology for Valkey
sources.relevance: Profiling tools (perf, VTune), false sharing, lock contention, thread-local storage, optimization methodology

sources.title: A New Hash Table for Valkey
sources.relevance: Open-addressing design, 64-byte cache-line buckets, secondary hash, child bucket chaining, memory savings

sources.title: Valkey RESP Protocol Specification
sources.relevance: Complete RESP2/RESP3 specification - data types, encoding, pipelining, push modes, inline commands

sources.title: Valkey Cluster Specification
sources.relevance: Hash slots, gossip protocol, cluster bus, failure detection, failover, configuration epochs, slot migration

sources.title: Valkey Replication Documentation
sources.relevance: PSYNC protocol, full/partial sync, replication IDs, backlog, diskless replication, dual-channel sync

sources.title: Valkey Persistence Documentation
sources.relevance: RDB snapshots, AOF logging, multi-part AOF, fsync policies, hybrid RDB+AOF, fork-based saves

sources.title: Valkey Modules Introduction
sources.relevance: Module development guide - OnLoad, command registration, data access, memory management, replication

sources.title: Valkey Modules API Reference
sources.relevance: Complete API function reference - memory, commands, strings, replies, keys, data types, blocking, clustering

sources.title: Valkey Modules API for Native Types
sources.relevance: Custom type registration, RDB callbacks, AOF rewriting, 9-character type names, persistence functions

sources.title: Valkey Modules 101 Blog
sources.relevance: Step-by-step module tutorial in C and Rust, compilation, loading, Makefile setup

sources.title: Valkey Modules Rust SDK
sources.relevance: Rust SDK for module development - idiomatic Rust API, macro-based configuration

sources.relevance: Project founding, Linux Foundation governance model, initial backers (AWS, Google, Oracle, Ericsson, Snap)

sources.relevance: First-year retrospective, community growth, governance evolution, weekly meetings structure

sources.title: Valkey 2025 Year-End Review
sources.relevance: Community metrics (346 contributors), 2026 roadmap, events, module ecosystem growth

sources.relevance: Architecture differences, I/O threading comparison, feature divergence, licensing split

sources.relevance: Performance benchmarks, threading models, feature comparison, fork differences

sources.relevance: Original SDS implementation - API reference, header layout, preallocation strategy
